solution_summary: Fix the flight search functionality to ensure the max_price filter correctly returns flights priced at or below the specified maximum price.
implementation_steps: Review the existing implementation in flight_service.py, particularly how the max price filter is currently applied.
Modify the search logic to correctly compare flight prices to the max_price parameter, ensuring only flights that are at or below this value are returned.
Implement unit tests to cover the new logic and validate edge cases, such as adding flights with prices exactly equal to max_price.
Test the updated functionality locally and confirm it meets the acceptance criteria.

planned_changes.change_summary: Update the flight search logic to return flights priced at or below the max price
planned_changes.rationale: Ensure that the GET /flights/search endpoint behaves according to the expected criteria by modifying the filter applied to the flight prices.

patch_strategy: Create a new branch from the main development branch, apply the changes to the selected file, commit the changes with a detailed message, push the branch to the remote repository, and create a pull request for review.
validation_steps: Run the modified unit tests to ensure that the new logic works correctly across various scenarios.
Manually test the `/flights/search` endpoint using a tool like Postman or CURL to make sure the responses are as expected under different conditions, especially for edge cases around the max_price.
Ensure that any existing tests still pass and that no other functionality is broken by the changes.
pr_title: Fix max price filter in flight search endpoint
pr_body: This PR addresses the issue where the flight search endpoint incorrectly returns flights that exceed the specified maximum price. The logic in flight_service.py has been modified to ensure that only flights priced at or below the specified max_price are returned. Additional unit tests have been added to confirm the behavior is as expected and edge cases are handled properly.
assumptions: The existing flight_service.py is the only file that needs modification to fix the max price filter issue.
